channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senate Advances ICE Funding Through Trump's Second Term
item.description: Senate Republicans advanced funding for ICE and Border Patrol through the end of President Trump's second term, after defeating several amendments.

item.title: Hunter Biden attempts to charm his online detractors
item.description: Hunter Biden is staging an unlikely reinvention, trying to disarm the internet trolls who targeted him.

item.title: Trump's Iran envoys hold secret nuclear talks in Tennessee
item.description: Trump envoys Witkoff and Kushner visited a Tennessee national lab for consultations with nuclear experts.

item.title: Kamala Harris takes redistricting fight to Louisiana
item.description: Former VP Harris heads to New Orleans as Democrats challenge a Supreme Court ruling on redistricting.
